title: Mobile app inventory details
scenario: Mobile app inventory details can be viewed by navigating through Poly Lens Menu > General > Account and logging into the Lens server
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) to open the side navigation.
Log in with valid Poly Lens credentials.
Navigate to the Lens server inventory section.
Locate and tap on Mobile app to view its details.
expected: The mobile app inventory details (e.g., app version, device info, status) are displayed on screen.
